title: Verify the presence of the back arrow in the header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the header containing the back arrow.
expected_result: The back arrow should be visible in the header.

title: Verify the title 'Find Gabor' in the header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the header containing the title 'Find Gabor'.
expected_result: The title 'Find Gabor' should be visible in the header.

title: Verify the large central image of a stylized pair of glasses with a star
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the large central image of a stylized pair of glasses with a star.
expected_result: The large central image of a stylized pair of glasses with a star should be visible.

title: Verify the subtitle 'Trains your attention, perception ability and the overall work of your brain'
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the subtitle 'Trains your attention, perception ability and the overall work of your brain'.
expected_result: The subtitle 'Trains your attention, perception ability and the overall work of your brain' should be visible.

title: Verify the 'how-to' button functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the 'how-to' button. | Click on the 'how-to' button.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'how-to' screen.

title: Verify the 'play' button functionality
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the 'play' button. | Click on the 'play' button.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the 'play' screen.

title: Verify the 'how-to' and 'play' buttons are clickable
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the screen with the 'how-to' and 'play' buttons. | Click on the 'how-to' button. | Click on the 'play' button.
expected_result: The 'how-to' and 'play' buttons should be clickable.
